---
title: "Deriving ecological indices from LiDAR data"
id: activity-analysis-6
order: 146
summary: "After simple ground-point classification, typical LiDAR processing can be performed."
source_url: "https://gisma-courses.github.io/LV-19-d19-006/modules/forest-lidar-gis/"
modules:
  - module-hr-analysis
Goals:
  - module-goals-spat-analysis
materials:
  - materialspat-analysis-6
assessments:
  - assessment-spat-analysis
labels:
  - advanced
  - supplement
  - optional
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/spatial_analysis/activity-analysis-6.md"
---

Read the LiDAR processing module:

<https://gisma-courses.github.io/LV-19-d19-006/modules/forest-lidar-gis/>

## Connected Module

- [Analysis of high resolution aerial data](../modules/module-hr-analysis.qmd)
